title: Figma Just Gave Everyone 10,000 Free AI Credits — Here's How to Claim Them
excerpt: Figma is offering 10,000 free AI credits to users. Learn how to enable Figma AI and start generating UI designs, images, and prototypes without paying extra.
content: If you're paying for AI design tools, image generators, or UI mockup platforms, you might want to check your Figma account first. Figma has started providing free AI credits that can be used for AI-powered design generation, image creation, prototyping, and more. Here's how to claim your credits and start using them today.
seo_title: Get 10,000 Free Figma AI Credits Before They're Gone
seo_description: Learn how to claim Figma's free AI credits and use them for UI generation, image creation, prototyping, and design assistance.
seo_keywords: figma ai credits, free figma ai, figma ai tools, figma free credits, ai ui design, figma ai features
author: Midhun NK

subtopics.title: 1. What Are Figma AI Credits?
subtopics.details: Figma AI credits allow users to access AI-powered features directly inside Figma. These credits can be used for generating UI layouts, creating images, accelerating design workflows, and building prototypes faster.

subtopics.title: 2. Why This Matters
subtopics.details: Many designers pay for separate AI tools to generate layouts, assets, and mockups. With Figma AI credits, you can perform many of these tasks without leaving your design workflow.
unordered_list: Save money on additional AI tools

subtopics.title: 3. How to Claim Your Free Credits
subtopics.details: Claiming the credits only takes a few minutes. Once enabled, the AI features become available directly inside your Figma workspace.
unordered_list: Credits appear automatically for eligible accounts
ordered_list: Verify your credits have been added

subtopics.title: 4. What Can You Build with These Credits?
subtopics.details: The free credits can be used across multiple AI-powered workflows inside Figma, making them useful for designers, developers, startups, and content creators.

subtopics.title: 5. Claim Them Before They Change the Limits
subtopics.details: Figma can modify AI credit limits, eligibility requirements, or promotional offers at any time. Even if you don't need the credits today, it's worth enabling them now so you can use them later.
unordered_list: Claim now to avoid missing out
